channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: U.S.-Iran hostilities appear to pause amid shaky ceasefire; life inside Gaza military zones.
item.description: Fighting between the U.S. and Iran has paused after two days of clashes. A report examines daily life inside Israeli military zones in Gaza.

item.title: Waymo alerted police about teen riders, sparking privacy concerns.
item.description: Two 15-year-olds were reportedly drinking alcohol and shooting toy guns from a driverless taxi when Waymo disabled the vehicle and contacted authorities.

item.title: Houston residents noticed more ICE agents in the area before a fatal shooting occurred.
item.description: Lorenzo Salgado Araujo, a 52-year-old Mexican construction worker and father of three, was fatally shot by immigration agents.

item.title: Major housing bill set to become law at midnight despite Trump's refusal to sign
item.description: President Trump says he will not sign the bill unless Congress first passes his voter ID legislation.
